2020年7月21日，美國國務卿蓬佩奥與前港督彭定康爵士進行了秘密會談。

Secretary of State Michael R. Pompeo participates in a pull aside with Sir Christopher Patten, last UK Governor of Hong Kong, in London, United Kingdom on July 21, 2020.
